concerns.text: SC-013 claims 'All metrics use explicit quantitative thresholds' but the maintainer decision specified null percentage ≤ 5% and format pass rate ≥ 99%. The current spec shows null percentage < 1% and format pass rate ≥ 95%. This creates an internal inconsistency between the maintainer's explicit threshold decision and the spec's stated values. Align SC-013 thresholds to match the maintainer decision verbatim.
